name: No one saw my ladder fall at work, can I still get comp?

mainEntity.name: No one saw my ladder fall at work, can I still get comp?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, your testimony plus medical evidence suffices; circumstantial proof works.**

Consistent story, site photos, ladder state build case. No witnesses common.

- Corroborate with coworkers' knowledge.
- Medical matches mechanism.
- Commissions accept.[1]

Avoid inconsistencies; lawyer strengthens.
